narrative:
DOMINANT DRIVERS

1. USD strength on H4 because CSM scores USD at 100 on H4 while CHF fades from 100 to 0, reversing the safe-haven hierarchy
2. Geopolitical risk premium because US-Iran tensions driving oil up 3.64% and VIX up 5.18% simultaneously, creating stagflationary pressure rather than clean risk-off
3. H4 momentum divergence from D1 because AUD, NZD, and CHF all show CSM fading on H4 while D1 remains elevated, signaling an intraday trend shift toward USD that has not yet resolved on daily timeframe

PRICE CONFIRMS

AUDUSD and NZDUSD are showing H4 buy signals despite AUD CSM collapsing to 15 and NZD to 0 on H4, which means these buy signals are losing momentum support and are unreliable. USDCHF is the cleanest confirmation of USD dominance given CHF fading from 100 to 0 on H4 while USD holds 100, and the strong negative correlation of minus 0.87 with EURUSD confirms EUR weakness is the mirror of this dynamic. CADJPY is the most internally consistent pair given USDJPY correlation at 0.91 and CAD accelerating to 42 on H4, making JPY cross strength against commodity currencies the most confirmed price behavior across sources.

REGIME

Mixed conflicted. VIX at 18.08 rising 5.18% argues risk-off, but S&P500 at 7419 up 0.27% and copper surging 3.21% argue risk-on, with gold at 4728 not breaking decisively, leaving no clean regime confirmation.

CONTRADICTIONS

1. AUD and NZD pairs: H4 signals show Buy on AUDJPY and NZDUSD but H4 CSM for both currencies sits at zero, making signal direction contradict momentum strength
2. Safe-haven hierarchy: D1 CSM shows CHF at 100 as strongest safe haven but H4 CSM has CHF collapsing to zero while USD takes the top, creating a cross-timeframe safe-haven leadership conflict with no resolution yet printed on daily candles

TRADE IMPLICATIONS

Best: USDCHF up - USD at H4 CSM 100, CHF fading from 100 to 0, correlation structure fully aligned - Conviction 7/10
Secondary: CADJPY up - CAD only currency accelerating on H4, USDJPY correlation 0.91 supports JPY cross weakness - Conviction 6/10
Avoid: AUDUSD - H4 buy signal contradicted by AUD CSM at 15 and USD dominance
Watch: DXY breaking above 98.50 confirms USD H4 strength is printing onto D1, validating USDCHF long and invalidating residual D1 CHF strength narrative

themes.theme: US-Iran geopolitical tensions and military escalation
Oil price surge on Hormuz closure fears and geopolitical risk
Risk-on sentiment supported by strong earnings and AI optimism
US inflation focus with CPI data imminent
USD depreciation trend from recent highs
Safe-haven demand for precious metals and currencies
UK political uncertainty with Starmer ouster concerns
Dovish central bank messaging limiting currency strength
European growth slowdown and BoE policy uncertainty
Higher-for-longer rate expectations capping safe-haven gains

key_observation: Market displaying bifurcated sentiment: strong equity rallies and risk-on flows from earnings and AI optimism supporting commodity currencies, offset by escalating US-Iran military tensions boosting oil and safe-havens. USD erasing early gains despite oil strength as equity rallies and dovish central bank messaging weigh. CPI data imminent as key inflection point.
watch: US CPI inflation data release, Trump-Iran military escalation trajectory, equity momentum sustainability, safe-haven demand persistence, oil price reaction to Hormuz closure developments, BoE and Fed rate path implications
